system.effect: A shoulder-mounted crane arm extending to roughly 1.5 metres. It grants +20 to Strength Tests, can be locked to an anchor point as a Free Action, and can be used as an improvised Primitive club dealing 1d5+2 Impact damage. It cannot perform fine manipulation.
system.drawbacks: Requires the relevant Mechadendrite Use talent and Cyber-Mantle. A character may not have more mechadendrites than his Toughness Bonus.

description.value: A heavy manipulator arm for lifting, bracing, and crude striking. In DH2 core this belongs in Cybernetics.

system.notes: Requires relevant Mechadendrite Use talent and Cyber-Mantle.
